---
title: "BBC Research"
page-layout: article
---

# BBC Research

## Description

Market research platform covering emerging technologies, healthcare, energy, materials, biotechnology, and industrial sectors. Useful for technology forecasting, industry analysis, and market assessment.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Health & Medicine, Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1766)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
